shorts.title_distilled: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​.
shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…

shorts.title: Paige Cognetti announces congressional campaign
shorts.description: PLAIN TWP., LUZERNE COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A familiar face kicked off her congressional campaign Wednesday afternoon. Scranton's mayor, Paige Cognetti, officially announced she's running as the democratic candidate in the 8th district primary, and she didn't waste any time taking aim at her republican opponent. Inside the Pennsylvania State Educational building in Luzerne County, Mayor [...]

More than 90 middle school girls from Old Forge, Tunkhannock, and the Susquehanna area packed Johnson College on Wednesday morning in Scranton. It's all part of Johnson College's Girls on [...]
shorts.content_distilled: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY  — Students across our region are given the chance to get hands-on with careers that most of them have never considered.

shorts.title: How to Watch: Scranton St. Patrick's Parade 2026
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — The 2026 Scranton Saint Patrick's Parade is set to step off Saturday, March 14: Here's how you can watch. The parade will be broadcast starting at noon on WYOU. For all you cord cutters out there, it will also be live streamed at the same time in this article and [...]
